positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration of a whimsical forest scene. The main subject is a grouping of stylized, bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns against a deep twilight sky. Use thick, clean lines and strong negative space. Composition should be centrally balanced, designed to look excellent as a repeating pattern or central graphic on apparel. Style: Modern flat vector art combined with Art Deco elements. Color Palette: Deep sapphire blue, ethereal mint green, pops of luminous gold, and charcoal black. Lighting: Dramatic high contrast, with the 'bioluminescent' elements providing the only strong light source, creating clean, sharp shadows. Highly detailed, perfect for screen printing, vector quality, 8k, clean silhouette.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, messy, photorealism, messy background, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast, grain, dirty lines
